The '''''Intruder''''' was a [[Namana-class light cruiser|''Namana''-class light cruiser]] and the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of the [[Bakuran Defense Fleet]].

==History==
Like the rest of the Fleet, it was loaned to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] in [[18 ABY/Legends|18 ABY]] during the [[Corellian Crisis]]. In the subsequent [[Battle of Centerpoint Station (Corellian Crisis)|Battle of Centerpoint Station]], ''Intruder'' was [[Ramming/Legends|critically damaged]] by two [[robot ramship]]s. Its commander [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Hortel Ossilege]], and the former Prime Minister of Bakura [[Gaeriel Captison]], activated the ship's self destruct sequence. Although all hands were lost with ''Intruder'', its explosion did manage to destroy a [[Sacorria]]n fleet and hold of the remainder of Corellian forces until Admiral [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar's]] fleet could arrive, thus saving the battle for the New Republic.

==Appearances==
*''[[Assault at Selonia]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Showdown at Centerpoint]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'' {{Mo}}
